nasb.text: the tabernacle, its tent and its covering, its hooks and its boards, its bars, its pillars, and its sockets;

esv.text: the tabernacle, its tent and its covering, its hooks and its frames, its bars, its pillars, and its bases;

cnv.text: 就是做帳幕、帳幕的棚罩、帳幕的蓋、鉤子、木板、橫閂、柱子、帳幕的座、

ccb.text: 即圣幕和圣幕的罩棚、顶盖、钩子、木板、横闩、柱子和底座；
